languages.text: Гвардия ринулась навстречу противнику с боевым кличем "Искупление для одного!" на устах. Далекие потомки штрафников с Мерова, зарковцы сражались столь же остервенело и исступленно, как и их пращуры, охваченные священной ненавистью к чужакам. Они обрушили на некронов всю ярость обреченных, и сумели задержать их ровно настолько, чтобы я и потомок успели добраться до платформ.

The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.
languages.original_text: Гвардия ринулась навстречу противнику с боевым кличем "Искупление для одного!" на устах. Далекие потомки штрафников с Мерова, зарковцы сражались столь же остервенело и исступленно, как и их пращуры, охваченные священной ненавистью к чужакам. Они обрушили на некронов всю ярость обреченных, и сумели задержать их ровно настолько, чтобы я и потомок успели добраться до платформ.

traits.locale_text: The guards charged at the enemy, the battlecry of "Freedom for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the frenzy and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for me and my scion to reach the platforms.

The guards charged at the enemy, the battlecry of "Freedom for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the frenzy and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for me and my scion to reach the platforms.

The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Freedom for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Freedom for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

languages.text: Los guardias cargaron contra el enemigo al grito de «¡Expiación para el último!». Los zarkovianos, descendientes directos de la legión penal de Merov, lucharon con el fervor y la ferocidad de sus antepasados, poseídos por un odio santo hacia los xenos. Desataron la furia de los condenados contra los Necrones y pudieron rechazarlos el tiempo suficiente para que mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo llegáramos a las plataformas.
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

traits.locale_text: Los guardias cargaron contra el enemigo al grito de «¡Expiación para el último!». Los zarkovianos, descendientes directos de la legión penal de Merov, lucharon con el fervor y la ferocidad de sus antepasados, poseídos por un odio santo hacia los xenos. Desataron la furia de los condenados contra los Necrones y pudieron rechazarlos el tiempo suficiente para que mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo llegáramos a las plataformas.

languages.text: Les gardes se ruèrent sur l'ennemi en hurlant « Expiation pour un seul ! ». Lointains descendants des légionnaires pénitentiaires de Merov, les Zarkoviens combattirent avec toute la ferveur et la férocité de leurs ancêtres, animés par une haine sacrée envers les xénos. Ils déchaînèrent toute leur fureur sur les Nécrons et réussirent à les repousser le temps pour que mon {mf|héritier|héritière} et moi-même puissions atteindre les plateformes.
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

traits.locale_text: Les gardes se ruèrent sur l'ennemi en hurlant « Expiation pour un seul ! ». Lointains descendants des légionnaires pénitentiaires de Merov, les Zarkoviens combattirent avec toute la ferveur et la férocité de leurs ancêtres, animés par une haine sacrée envers les xénos. Ils déchaînèrent toute leur fureur sur les Nécrons et réussirent à les repousser le temps pour que mon {mf|héritier|héritière} et moi-même puissions atteindre les plateformes.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫守卫高喊着“一人之赎！”发起冲锋。身为梅罗夫判罪军团的后裔，他们继承了祖辈的狂热与凶狠，对异形怀有满腔的神圣仇恨。他们将必死之人的怒火，尽数倾泻在了太空死灵身上，为我与继承人登上浮台争取了时间。
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫守卫高喊着“一人之赎！”发起冲锋。身为梅罗夫判罪军团的后裔，他们继承了祖辈的狂热与凶狠，对异形怀有满腔的神圣仇恨。他们将必死之人的怒火，尽数倾泻在了太空死灵身上，为我与继承人登上浮台争取了时间。

languages.text: Die Gardisten stürzten sich mit dem Schlachtruf "Buße für den Einzelnen!" auf den Feind. Als entfernte Nachkommen der Straflegionäre von Merov kämpften die Zarkovianer mit dem Eifer und der Entschlossenheit ihrer Ahnen, getrieben von einem heiligen Hass auf alle Xenos. Sie brachten den Zorn der Verlorenen über die Necrons und konnten sie gerade lange genug aufhalten, bis {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} die Plattformen erreichten.
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

traits.locale_text: Die Gardisten stürzten sich mit dem Schlachtruf "Buße für den Einzelnen!" auf den Feind. Als entfernte Nachkommen der Straflegionäre von Merov kämpften die Zarkovianer mit dem Eifer und der Entschlossenheit ihrer Ahnen, getrieben von einem heiligen Hass auf alle Xenos. Sie brachten den Zorn der Verlorenen über die Necrons und konnten sie gerade lange genug aufhalten, bis {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} die Plattformen erreichten.

languages.text: Muhafızlar, dudaklarında "Sona kalana kefaret!" narasıyla düşmana hücum etti. Merovlu ceza lejyonerlerinin soyundan gelen Zarkovlular, zenolara karşı duydukları kutsal bir nefretle tüketilmiş hâlde atalarının tüm şevki ve gaddarlığıyla savaştı. Mahkûmların öfkesini Nekronların üzerine saldılar ve onları, vârisimle benim platformlara ulaşmamıza yetecek kadar oyalayabildiler.
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.

traits.locale_text: Muhafızlar, dudaklarında "Sona kalana kefaret!" narasıyla düşmana hücum etti. Merovlu ceza lejyonerlerinin soyundan gelen Zarkovlular, zenolara karşı duydukları kutsal bir nefretle tüketilmiş hâlde atalarının tüm şevki ve gaddarlığıyla savaştı. Mahkûmların öfkesini Nekronların üzerine saldılar ve onları, vârisimle benim platformlara ulaşmamıza yetecek kadar oyalayabildiler.

languages.text: ガードマンは敵に向かって突撃し、「一人への償い」の戦いの叫びを口にした。メロヴの刑務所兵の遠い子孫であるザルコビアンは、祖先たちの熱意と激しさをもって、異星人の聖なる憎しみを燃やし、死の宣告を受けた者の怒りをネクロナートに浴びせ、私の子孫と私がプラットフォームにたどり着くまで、彼らを押し止めた。
languages.original_text: The Guardsmen charged at the enemy, the battle cry of "Atonement for the one!" on their lips. Distant descendants of the penal legionnaires of Merov, the Zarkovians fought with all the fervour and ferocity of their progenitors, consumed by a holy hatred of the xenos. They unleashed the fury of the doomed upon the Necrons, and were able to hold them off just long enough for my scion and I to reach the platforms.
